name: llm-os-agent
description: Orbit — local agent-operations console: harness orchestration, policy, observability.

scripts.dev: npm run clean && concurrently -k -n backend,dashboard -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -k -n backend,dashboard -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm --prefix dashboard run start"
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-verify npm --prefix dashboard run build
